# Abhishek Badar

> Software Development Engineer at Xeo Information Systems (Pune, India). Builds end-to-end web, mobile, and backend systems with React, Next.js, TypeScript, Laravel, and Flutter — plus AI in production (RAG with Pinecone, OCR workflows, automation). IIT Ropar AI Minor graduate.

Abhishek designs and ships products across the full stack — web frontends, mobile apps, backends, and the automation between them — with a focus on simple, fast, maintainable systems built for real usage. The portfolio at abhishekbadar.com is an interactive 3D (WebGL) experience; the complete text content is mirrored in the files linked below for language models.

## Key pages
- [Portfolio home](https://www.abhishekbadar.com/): Interactive 3D portfolio with about, experience, projects, and skills.
- [Full profile (Markdown)](https://www.abhishekbadar.com/llms-full.txt): Complete bio, work experience, and every project description in plain text.
- [Résumé (PDF)](https://www.abhishekbadar.com/Resume_AbhishekBadar.pdf): Downloadable résumé.

## Experience
- Software Development Engineer I, Xeo Information Systems (Mar 2025–Present): Frontend replatform (Laravel Blade → Next.js), a Flutter app built end-to-end (500+ users), and the Laravel backend serving both.
- Associate Software Engineer, Refyne (Aug 2024–Feb 2025): Built the internal CRM used by 150+ across sales, risk, and growth; automated workflows across Slack, Gmail, and ClickUp; shipped an LLM + Pinecone HR chatbot.

## Selected projects
- [twitter-autoposter](https://github.com/AbhishekBadar/twitter-autoposter): Self-running content pipeline (DeepSeek, Telegram approval bot, GitHub Actions).
- [Claude-Tracker](https://github.com/AbhishekBadar/Claude-Tracker): Native macOS menu-bar app tracking Claude Code usage windows (Swift/SwiftUI).
- [Save Image As](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/save-image-as/bcngajhkkkhfalgljjjjbjacjcdlophj): Chrome extension with smart file-naming — 2.46K+ installs, 1K+ active users.
- [Traffic Density Analyzer](https://github.com/AbhishekBadar/Traffic-Density-Analyzer): YOLO-based vehicle detection and dynamic signal timing.
